summary: REQ-6 is only partially implemented: ProjectsPage.tsx now points TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes to the new generated image path, but the actual image file is not present in the diff (no files added). REQ-5 (unified brighter/white/consistent description typography across all cards) cannot be confirmed from the truncated ProjectsPage.tsx diff; only a secondary summary file claims it. The diff also includes modifications to files not requested in the BuildRequest.

missing_requirements.requirement: Update Projects/SubDAOs project card typography so ALL cards use the same brighter/clearer text styling, with ALL description text (including bullet points) rendered in white and using consistent font size/style across every card.
missing_requirements.reason: The provided diff for frontend/src/pages/ProjectsPage.tsx is truncated and does not show the card rendering/styling classes for descriptions across all cards, so it cannot be verified that muted gray classes were removed and that font size/style is consistent for every card.

missing_requirements.requirement: Add a new generated TeleMeetUp & TMU-Notes image asset under frontend/public/assets/generated with filename telemeetup-tmu-notes-project.dim_400x250.png (specified dimensions) and update the project card to use it.
missing_requirements.reason: The ProjectsPage.tsx reference to /assets/generated/telemeetup-tmu-notes-project.dim_400x250.png is present, but the diff shows no added image files (Added: 0), so the required new asset file is missing from the change set.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified project_state.json even though the BuildRequest only requests frontend changes on ProjectsPage.tsx and generating an image asset.
hallucinated_features.reason: project_state.json changes are not requested as part of REQ-5/REQ-6 deliverables.

hallucinated_features.description: Modified frontend-file-summaries.txt, which is not requested by REQ-5/REQ-6.
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not ask to update repository summary/documentation files; it focuses on ProjectsPage.tsx typography and adding a generated image asset.
